channel.title: Unity on ljf12825
channel.description: Recent content in Unity on ljf12825

item.title: Attribute in Unity
item.description: The usage and principles of common Attributes in Unity and C#

item.title: C# in Unity
item.description: The Range of C# in Unity Game Development

item.title: Character Controller
item.description: Introduction of Character Controller in Unity. Usage of Character Controller. Implement of Character Controller.

item.title: Collider & Trigger
item.description: Collider’s core functions, categories, Inspector panel parameters, code API, alignment methods, and Trigger application scenarios in Unity

item.title: Frame
item.description: Frame and GameLoop

item.title: FSM
item.description: Introduction and implement of FSM

item.title: Gizmos
item.description: Introduction and usage examples of Gizmos

item.title: Input System
item.description: Introduction and usage of older and new input system

item.title: Joint
item.description: Introduction Joint(Components, Example and API)

item.title: Layout
item.description: Introduction Layout Component

item.title: Loose Coupling
item.description: Introductions the idea of loose coupling and serveral common loose coupling practice(Delegate/Event, Interface and Abstract, ScriptabbleObject, EventBus, DI/Service Locate), as well as example of anti-patterns

item.title: Mask
item.description: Introduction mask principle and usage in Unity

item.title: Mesh
item.description: Introduction Mesh，Mesh in Unity

item.title: Mono and IL2CPP
item.description: Comparison of Mono and IL2CPP modes

item.title: Particle System
item.description: Praicle System in Unity and its implement

item.title: Physics System
item.description: Physics System in Unity(2D, 3D). Combination of Collider, Rigidbody and Trigger.

item.title: Rigidbody
item.description: Introduction and API of Rigidbody component in Unity

item.title: Script Layer to Native Layer
item.description: Unity’s double layer structure

item.title: ScriptableObject
item.description: Introduction and Usage Examples of ScriptableObject

item.title: Scripts
item.description: How to write scripts in Unity
